prompt: Prayer for blessing a bike squadron before patrol
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Hear now the Litany of Swift Wheels, that the machine-spirits quicken!
CONGREGATION: By fuel and spark, by chain and thrust!
TECH-PRIEST: Let oil flow to every joint. Let pressure rise in blessed chambers.
CONGREGATION: The Omnissiah guides our treads!
TECH-PRIEST: May no jitter corrupt the ignition-pulse. May no friction-demon seize the throttle-linkage.
CONGREGATION: We ride in the Emperor's name, and the Machine Spirit's grace.

prompt: First blessing for a newly-cast autocannon barrel
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Behold the barrel-spirit, newborn from the sacred furnace!
CONGREGATION: Cool it, bless it, test its temper!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Let blessed oils anoint the rifling-grooves. Second: Let coolant-channels drink deep of the cryogenic mercy.
CONGREGATION: May heat-death never crack the blessed steel!
TECH-PRIEST: Fire once in reverence. Let the recoil-dampeners sing their approval.
CONGREGATION: By the Machine God's will, this barrel shall not fail.

prompt: Ritual inspection blessing for servo-armor before deployment
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Test now the blessed carapace that shields the faithful!
CONGREGATION: Inspect each plate, each joint, each seal!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Check the servo-motors for fluid-pressure. Second: Verify the strain-gauges read true. Third: Confirm no fractures mar the ceramite.
CONGREGATION: Strong we stand. Safe we march.
TECH-PRIEST: May no shrapnel find the gaps. May no blast-force overwhelm the kinetic-dispersal.
CONGREGATION: The Machine Spirit protects the faithful.

prompt: Combat preparation: rite against weapon jamming
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Against the jamming-daemon, we invoke the Litany of Clear Chambers!
CONGREGATION: No fouling! No blockage! No mechanical sin!
TECH-PRIEST: Let the feed-mechanism cycle smooth. Let the ejector-spring remain ever-tensile. Let no grain of propellant-ash clog the sacred bore.
CONGREGATION: The Emperor's wrath flows unimpeded!
TECH-PRIEST: By blessed lubricant and disciplined maintenance, may this weapon never betray us in battle.
CONGREGATION: Swift fire. True aim. Victory eternal.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of solar panel arrays
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The panels are healed! Now let them drink deep of the holy sun!
CONGREGATION: Align them true to the light eternal!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Adjust the servo-motors to track the solar disc. Second: Verify no dust-film obscures the photoreceptive cells. Third: Confirm the power-conduits carry full amperage-blessing.
CONGREGATION: Light becomes strength. Strength becomes faith.
TECH-PRIEST: May these panels burn bright, that the machine-spirit never hunger for power.
CONGREGATION: Praised be the sun-blessed circuit.

prompt: Routine activation of pain suppressor systems
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Engage now the merciful numbing-circuits, that the faithful may endure!
CONGREGATION: Dull the agony. Sharpen the will.
TECH-PRIEST: Let the neural-dampers initialize. Let the drug-dispensers prime their blessed cocktails. Let no signal of torment reach the conscious-mind.
CONGREGATION: We suffer, yet we serve.
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's grace, pain becomes purpose. Weakness becomes strength.
CONGREGATION: The machine-spirit asks no mercy, and we grant it none to ourselves.

prompt: Emergency thermal dissipation rite for overheating reactor
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The heat-death approaches! Invoke the Litany of Cooling-Flow!
CONGREGATION: Purge the circuit! Vent the furnace! Mercy, machine-spirit, mercy!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Open the primary coolant-valve. Second: Divert excess power to the secondary heat-sinks. Third: Activate the emergency venting-ports.
CONGREGATION: Cool! Cool! Cool the blessed flames!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's intervention, let no meltdown consume this holy machine.
CONGREGATION: We are saved. The machine endures.

prompt: Emergency pressure equalization before hull breach
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The void approaches! Equalize the blessed pressures!
CONGREGATION: Balance the chambers! Seal the breaches! Hold the integrity!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Close all pressure-bulkheads. Second: Vent contaminated atmosphere to the scrubber-system. Third: Re-pressurize from the emergency canisters.
CONGREGATION: Pressure restored! Seals intact! Life preserved!
TECH-PRIEST: By the Omnissiah's will, the void shall not claim us this day.
CONGREGATION: We breathe. We live. We endure.

prompt: Combat preparation: blessing of gravitational anomaly sensors
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Awaken the gravity-sense, that we may perceive the warp-touched!
CONGREGATION: Let no anomaly escape our blessed detection!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Calibrate the torsion-sensors to baseline. Second: Verify the data-conduits transmit without corruption. Third: Confirm the alert-runes glow with readiness.
CONGREGATION: We see what others cannot!
TECH-PRIEST: May the Machine Spirit grant us warning before the void-touched reach our lines.
CONGREGATION: Knowledge is power. Vigilance is salvation.

prompt: Emergency consecration of assembly line after catastrophic failure
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The line is shattered! The machines weep! Yet we shall rebuild the sacred order!
CONGREGATION: Restore! Consecrate! Make whole again!
TECH-PRIEST: First: Clear the wreckage from the blessed apparatus. Second: Anoint each mechanism with restoration-oils. Third: Invoke the machine-spirits with the Litany of Renewal.
CONGREGATION: The Omnissiah demands we serve!
TECH-PRIEST: Let production resume. Let no heresy of idleness touch this holy forge.
CONGREGATION: The machines live. The line endures. Production eternal.
